svg.desc:
# Jolly System Context — Nomnoml format # View: nomnoml jolly-context.nomnoml && chafa out.png
# Style #stroke: #333 #fill: #fff #background: transparent #font: monospace #fontSize: 11 #leading: 4 #arrowSize: 0.5 #bendSize: 0.3 #lineWidth: 1.5 #padding: 12 #spacing: 40 #edges: hard #gutter: 8
[<frame> Jolly System Context | [<actor> AI Agent] -> [Jolly CLI] [<actor> Human Customer] -> [Jolly CLI]
[<box> Jolly CLI | @dk/jolly -- login | logout | auth status init | start | doctor | upgrade skills | create store | completion ]
[Jolly CLI] -> [Saleor Cloud API] [Jolly CLI] -> [Saleor Auth] [Jolly CLI] -> [Saleor GraphQL] [Jolly CLI] -> [GitHub] [Jolly CLI] -> [Vercel CLI] [Jolly CLI] -> [@saleor/configurator]
[<database> Saleor Cloud API | cloud.saleor.io] [<database> Saleor Auth | auth.saleor.io] [<database> Saleor GraphQL | *.saleor.cloud/graphql/] [<database> GitHub | github.com] [<database> Vercel CLI | npx vercel] [<database> @saleor/configurator | npx configurator] ]
